lemon_market_new_listings.description: Mint condition.

The vehicle is in fair condition. The exterior has several noticeable scratches and small dents. The interior shows moderate wear and some staining on the seats. All mechanical systems are currently operational.

The vehicle is in fair condition. The exterior has visible scratches and several small dents. The interior shows significant wear and staining. Mechanically, the engine and transmission are functional, though the vehicle would benefit from a tune-up.

Calling all DIY enthusiasts and restoration fans! This car is a fantastic project opportunity for anyone looking to roll up their sleeves and bring a vehicle back to life. While it currently needs significant mechanical and cosmetic attention, it offers a solid starting point at an unbeatable price for someone with the right skills!

This vehicle is in fair condition and has been a reliable daily driver. It shows its age with visible paint fading on the hood and roof, along with some minor scuffs and dings around the body. The interior is clean but shows significant wear on the driver's seat and carpets. While the car is currently operational, it will soon require mechanical attention for some minor leaks and suspension work. This is a solid option for a buyer willing to invest a little work into a functional vehicle.

Presenting an automotive specimen of unrivaled caliber. This vehicle is offered in pristine, showroom condition, having been meticulously curated and maintained to the highest standards of excellence. Every surface, from the flawless exterior finish to the immaculate interior upholstery, reflects a commitment to absolute preservation. Mechanically, the vehicle operates with the precision and fluidity of its initial delivery. This is a rare opportunity for the discerning enthusiast to acquire a truly peerless example of the model.

Hey there! You've gotta see this absolute beauty. 🚗✨ I have treated this car like my own baby, and it honestly looks and feels like it just rolled off the showroom floor! It's in pristine, mint condition with not a single scratch or worry in sight. It drives like an absolute dream and is ready for its next big adventure. I'm so excited for whoever gets to take this home—you're going to love it!

Mint condition. Garage kept. No accidents. Full service history. Clean title.

This vehicle is the definition of a collector’s dream. Meticulously maintained and kept in a climate-controlled garage, the exterior boasts a deep, mirror-like finish with zero imperfections, protected by a premium ceramic coating that makes the paint pop. Inside, the cabin remains in showroom state; the premium leather seats are supple and free of any creasing or wear, and the original 'new car' scent still lingers. Every feature, from the advanced driver-assistance systems to the high-fidelity sound system, functions flawlessly. Mechanically, this car is peerless. It has been serviced exclusively at certified dealerships on a strict schedule, with a comprehensive folder of maintenance records to prove its pampered history. Presented here is an automotive specimen of the highest caliber, maintained in a state that transcends standard definitions of quality. This vehicle exhibits a museum-grade exterior finish and an interior that remains indistinguishable from its original factory delivery. Every mechanical component has been subjected to rigorous scrutiny, ensuring performance that aligns with the manufacturer's premier specifications. For the discerning collector or enthusiast who demands nothing less than the definitive standard, this offering represents an unparalleled acquisition opportunity.

We are pleased to present this exemplary vehicle, maintained to the highest standards of automotive excellence. This unit remains in showroom condition, exhibiting no discernible wear and reflecting a history of meticulous stewardship. With its flawless finish and pristine interior, it represents a premier acquisition for the discerning buyer who demands uncompromising quality and performance. This vehicle is offered as a definitive example of its class, prepared for immediate delivery to a sophisticated collector or enthusiast.

Hey there! Honestly, you won't believe how gorgeous this ride is—it's in absolute mint condition and looks like it just rolled off the lot! I’ve babied this car since day one, and it drives perfectly. If you're looking for something that feels brand new without the showroom wait, this is the one for you. Let's get you behind the wheel!

This collector-grade E46 M3 represents the pinnacle of naturally aspirated engineering. The S54 inline-six delivers linear power via six individual throttle bodies, with the double VANOS system meticulously calibrated for optimal torque across the rev range. The chassis is structurally flawless, featuring a reinforced rear subframe and a crisp Getrag 6-speed manual gearbox paired with a factory limited-slip differential. Every bushing is tight, the suspension geometry is factory-spec, and the engine bay is concours-ready. This is a turn-key example for the purist who demands mechanical perfection and uncompromising performance.

Presented in absolute showroom condition, this vehicle is a true collector-grade example that must be seen to be appreciated. The exterior boasts a flawless, mirror-like finish with zero imperfections, rock chips, or swirl marks, having been meticulously garage-kept and professionally ceramic coated. Hey there! I’m honestly so sad to let this beauty go, but it’s time for a new home. This car is in absolutely pristine condition—seriously, it looks and smells like it just rolled off the showroom floor! Step into a vehicle that looks and drives as if it just rolled off the showroom floor. This meticulously maintained masterpiece features a flawless exterior with a deep, mirror-like finish, protected by a professional ceramic coating. There isn't a single swirl mark, stone chip, or parking lot ding to be found. Inside, the cabin remains in showroom state; the premium leather upholstery is supple and free of any wear or creasing, and the interior still carries that brand-new scent. Every electronic component, from the high-fidelity sound system to the advanced climate control, functions perfectly. Mechanically, this car is beyond reproach. It has been strictly garage-kept and has followed a rigorous, proactive maintenance schedule with all service records available for your review. The engine runs with silent precision, and the transmission shifts with seamless fluidity. This is a rare opportunity for the discerning collector or enthusiast to own a truly pristine example of automotive excellence.

We are pleased to present this exceptional vehicle, maintained to an uncompromising standard of excellence. This specimen exhibits a flawless exterior finish complemented by a pristine cabin that retains its original factory luster. Every mechanical component has been rigorously inspected to ensure peak performance, mirroring its showroom-floor condition. This is a premier opportunity for the discerning buyer to acquire a vehicle of peerless quality and provenance.
